wafv2.webacl.singlequeryargument.CfnAbou:
Inspect one query argument in the web request, identified by name, for example *UserName* or *SalesRegion*. The name isn't case sensitive. 

This is used to indicate the web request component to inspect, in the [FieldToMatch](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-wafv2-rulegroup-xssmatchstatement.html

wafv2.webacl.singlequeryargument.Name.Description: The name of the query argument to inspect.
